nasb.text: Behold, when the wall has fallen, will you not be asked, ‘Where is the plaster with which you plastered it?’ ”

esv.text: And when the wall falls, will it not be said to you, ‘Where is the coating with which you smeared it?’

cnv.text: 那牆倒塌以後，人豈不會問你們：‘你們所粉刷的在哪裡呢？’”

ccb.text: 墙倒塌之后，一定会有人问，‘你们粉饰的白灰在哪里呢？’
